pages.text: To place a magic circle, simply $(bold)right-click$() while holding the Ritual Dagger. A GUI will appear letting you choose the type of sigil to draw.$(br2)The circle will appear $(bold)beneath your feet$() and costs 3 seconds of Bleeding.

A magic circle only functions if it is within range of an active Magic Center Block. The center block must have enough fuel for the circles to work.$(br2)Circles are fragile - they break easily and do not drop anything when broken.
